query:
CREATE TABLE `datalog_cache` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`fileName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`s3Key` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`s3Url` text NOT NULL,
	`fileSize` int NOT NULL,
	`sourcePage` varchar(128) DEFAULT 'analyzer',
	`uploadedBy` varchar(128),
	`uploaderName` varchar(256),
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `datalog_cache_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user fZHarJdB59o6HX6.root --database S5fEZ6uPndYXxpVXwwyEPy --execute CREATE TABLE `datalog_cache` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`fileName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`s3Key` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`s3Url` text NOT NULL,
	`fileSize` int NOT NULL,
	`sourcePage` varchar(128) DEFAULT 'analyzer',
	`uploadedBy` varchar(128),
	`uploaderName` varchar(256),
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `datalog_cache_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
